creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text: The link https://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-translators should redirect to https://lists.freebsd.org/subscription/freebsd-translators , however there is a typo in the word 'translators' so that it redirects to https://lists.freebsd.org/subscription/freebsd-translatators instead.
